falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern featured VIX spike >40 as a capitulation marker; sustained elevated VIX without immediate reversal indicates this is not a similar bottom formation but rather the start of a prolonged drawdown, invalidating the pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve steepens by >30bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with curve flattening/bear steepening as recession fears peaked; a rapid bull steepening would signal banking stress or flight-to-safety panic inconsistent with the pattern's macro regime, proving the 78% match false

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below its 200-day moving average for 3 consecutive sessions
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug held above the 200DMA with immediate V-shaped recovery; sustained breakdown below this level demonstrates structural weakness absent in the original pattern, falsifying the comparison and indicating continuation rather than reversal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
